title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: NotebookLM has received major updates and is now more popular than Gemini. The platform includes a three-column layout with Sources, Chat, and Studio panels offering tools for generating reports, slide decks, infographics, mind maps, data tables, video overviews, quizzes, flashcards, and audio overviews from source documents.
